mapper.select: select p.id, p.user_id as userId, u.username, u.nick_name as nickName, p.text_content as textContent, p.image_url as imageUrl, p.code_language as codeLanguage, p.code_content as codeContent, p.like_count as likeCount, p.comment_count as commentCount, p.create_time as createTime, p.update_time as updateTime from social_post p left join news_user u on p.user_id = u.uid where p.is_deleted = 0 order by p.create_time desc

select p.id, p.user_id as userId, u.username, u.nick_name as nickName, p.text_content as textContent, p.image_url as imageUrl, p.code_language as codeLanguage, p.code_content as codeContent, p.like_count as likeCount, p.comment_count as commentCount, p.create_time as createTime, p.update_time as updateTime from social_post p left join news_user u on p.user_id = u.uid where p.is_deleted = 0 and p.user_id = #{userId} order by p.create_time desc

select p.id, p.user_id as userId, u.username, u.nick_name as nickName, p.text_content as textContent, p.image_url as imageUrl, p.code_language as codeLanguage, p.code_content as codeContent, p.like_count as likeCount, p.comment_count as commentCount, p.create_time as createTime, p.update_time as updateTime from social_post p left join news_user u on p.user_id = u.uid where p.id = #{postId} and p.is_deleted = 0
